subject: A lone rider gallops across a stone bridge at night, holding a flaming torch high overhead so that sparks and embers stream behind them
description: A mounted figure rides at full gallop across an arched stone bridge or causeway, silhouetted against a deep blue starlit sky. The rider thrusts a torch or lantern aloft in one hand, and the flame trails a long plume of golden sparks and embers behind them as they charge forward. The architecture and landscape below are rendered in cool moonlit blues and purples, while the torch and its sparks dominate the upper third of the frame in hot orange-yellow. The composition emphasizes motion and exhilaration — the rider leans into the ride, the horse is mid-stride, and the night sky stretches wide open ahead of them.
foreground: rider on horseback raising a flaming torch, mid-gallop across a stone bridge
background: starlit night sky over a moonlit landscape with stone architecture
emotion: exhilarated, bold, leaning forward into the ride with reckless confidence
